tool.name: rottentomatoes_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple titles on Rotten Tomatoes in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling rottentomatoes_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'The Matrix,Breaking Bad,The Godfather')
